query:
SELECT pv.id, pv.sku, p.name as product_name, vp.batchNumber, vp.quantity, vp.unitPrice 
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id
LEFT JOIN variant_pricing vp ON pv.id = vp.variantId
WHERE pv.sku = 'DT-001-OAK'
LIMIT 20;
